particulars.description: Mortgage debenture - all monies. (A) a specific equitable charge over the company's estate or interest in all freehold or leasehold properties now or at any time belonging to or charged to the company.. (B) a specific charge over all book and other debts for the time being due or owing to the company but so that the company shall pay into the company's account with the bank all moneys which it may receive in respect of such debts and shall not without the prior consent in writing of the bank sell factor discount or otherwise change or assign the same in favour...............
